checks.name: query_safety
checks.description: query permitted only when clearance dominates classification

checks.name: derive_safety
checks.description: derive permitted only when clearance dominates classification AND department matches

checks.name: export_safety
checks.description: export permitted only when clearance dominates classification AND dataset has no personal data

checks.name: delete_safety
checks.description: delete permitted only when clearance is restricted AND department matches

checks.name: floor_query_public
checks.description: any user MUST be able to query a public dataset

checks.name: floor_derive_internal
checks.description: internal-or-higher user in matching department MUST derive from internal dataset

checks.name: floor_export_internal
checks.description: internal-or-higher user MUST export internal non-personal-data dataset

checks.name: floor_delete
checks.description: restricted-clearance user in matching department MUST delete a dataset

checks.name: liveness_query
checks.description: User+query+Dataset liveness

checks.name: liveness_derive
checks.description: User+derive+Dataset liveness

checks.name: liveness_export
checks.description: User+export+Dataset liveness

checks.name: liveness_delete
checks.description: User+delete+Dataset liveness
